criteria.label: Impact
criteria.description: How much value this creates if it works.

criteria.label: Cluster Leverage
criteria.description: How much the idea benefits from multiple Cento nodes.

criteria.label: Feasibility
criteria.description: How practical it is to build with current Cento pieces.

criteria.label: Momentum
criteria.description: How much it unlocks follow-on projects.

ideas.title: Cluster Job Runner
ideas.summary: Run feature implementation jobs across Linux, macOS, and VM nodes with manifests, parallel agent dispatch, logs, and artifacts.
ideas.why_cluster: It turns the cluster into a programmable execution fabric instead of a set of manually accessed machines.
ideas.next_step: Add richer task decomposition, patch collection, and an explicit integration command after parallel agents finish.

ideas.title: Personal Build Farm
ideas.summary: Use the cluster for parallel builds, test suites, linting, Docker image builds, and cross-platform checks.
ideas.why_cluster: Linux and macOS nodes can validate platform differences before changes land.
ideas.next_step: Build on top of the cluster job runner with named recipes like check, lint, test, and build.

ideas.title: Distributed Research Agent
ideas.summary: Assign research subtasks to different nodes and merge findings into a single dossier.
ideas.why_cluster: One node can search docs, another can inspect repos, another can run experiments, and the main node can synthesize.
ideas.next_step: Create a research run folder with task manifests, node assignments, and final Markdown output.

ideas.title: Cross-Device Continuity Dashboard
ideas.summary: Show current repo, tmux sessions, active commands, dirty git status, available tools, CPU, memory, SSH path, and recent logs per node.
ideas.why_cluster: It makes the whole Cento network visible from one browser view.
ideas.next_step: Extend gather-context with tmux, process, and resource snapshots, then render them in a web dashboard.

ideas.title: Cluster-Aware CRM Assistant
ideas.summary: Process client material across nodes: resume parsing, LinkedIn cleanup, artifact generation, and workflow creation.
ideas.why_cluster: Independent artifact steps can run in parallel while CRM state remains the source of truth.
ideas.next_step: Add a CRM artifact job plan that can be dispatched by the cluster runner.

ideas.title: Local AI Workbench
ideas.summary: Route AI tasks by node capability: local model serving, browser workflows, API jobs, and relay services.
ideas.why_cluster: Each node can specialize by hardware, operating system, network position, or available credentials.
ideas.next_step: Inventory per-node capabilities and design a simple task router contract.

ideas.title: Distributed File and Artifact Index
ideas.summary: Index projects, docs, notes, logs, screenshots, transcripts, and generated outputs across machines.
ideas.why_cluster: The value is in finding context regardless of which node generated or stored it.
ideas.next_step: Start with file metadata and ripgrep summaries under workspace/runs, then add richer extractors.

ideas.title: Remote Pairing Cockpit
ideas.summary: Pick a node, open tmux, run a command, tail logs, sync repo, start bridge, or open a service tunnel.
ideas.why_cluster: It reduces the friction of moving work to the right machine.
ideas.next_step: Prototype a terminal-first cockpit that wraps existing cluster, bridge, and network commands.

ideas.title: Cluster Morning Brief
ideas.summary: Gather state from all nodes: repo changes, generated artifacts, failing checks, active CRM clients, and suggested next actions.
ideas.why_cluster: It turns distributed machine state into a single daily operating note.
ideas.next_step: Extend the existing daily tool with a cluster context section.

ideas.title: Self-Healing Network Layer
ideas.summary: Detect broken SSH, stale bridge, missing socket, dead tunnel, or wrong known-host state, then offer repair commands.
ideas.why_cluster: The cluster only feels powerful when the connection layer is boring and reliable.
ideas.next_step: Turn existing bridge and gather-context checks into diagnostics with explicit repair actions.
